title: podman push without destination image
body:
the destination image for podman push should be optional (if the destination
has already been tagged in).  the man page for podman push describes that it
should work this way.

Resolves: #645

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: I think the error message should be reworded, otherwise LGTM

Error message has been reworked, merging
@rh-atomic-bot r+
